summary: Enthusiastic fan hails this as possibly the best show of their last tour, but no recording details are provided.
review: The lone 5‑star review is glowing, stating the concert may have been the highlight of the Dead's final tour and noting the reviewer’s personal experience at earlier June shows. No information about the source or sonic clarity is mentioned, so the audio quality remains uncertain while the musical performance is clearly praised.

ai_rating.rationale: A single enthusiastic 5‑star review emphasizes a great show; lack of technical commentary limits confidence, so rating leans high for performance but is tempered by uncertainty about recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Review provides no comments on soundboard vs. audience source, clarity, or mix issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer only remarks that the show was outstanding overall; no specifics about song order or pacing are given.
